description:
Parent epic: V3 E9: Memory and compaction

Source task 1/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Audit memory capture, retrieval, namespace, shared namespace, and inspection.

Epic closure criteria:
- memory and compaction have separate, crisp docs and tests
- compaction does not mutate the canonical transcript

comments.text: Audited memory capture, retrieval, namespace modes, shared namespace behavior, and inspection. Current implementation retrieves before the turn, captures after successful completion, stores request metadata, emits trace events, supports per-agent/shared/context namespaces, supports instruction/context injection, fails retrieval through a structured request error, and records capture failures without changing an already completed result. Recorded the V3 contract in FEATURES/MILESTONE. Verified with mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E9: Audit memory capture, retrieval, namespace, shared namespace, and inspection
